onboarding.subtitle: Master the Indian election process with your personal AI assistant.

voter_selection.title: Is this your first time voting?
voter_selection.subtitle: We'll tailor your experience to make it simple and stress-free.
voter_selection.yes_desc: I need help with everything from registration to the booth.
voter_selection.no_desc: I just need a quick status check and booth info.

dashboard.complete_profile: Complete your profile to be 100% ready
dashboard.first_timer_guidance: Since it's your first time, we've highlighted the most critical steps for you. Don't worry, it's simpler than it looks!

journey.title: Your Journey
journey.subtitle: Follow these steps to ensure you're ready.

registration.title: Voter Registration
registration.desc: Fill Form 6 on NVSP portal to register as a new voter.

verification.title: Document Verification
verification.desc: Your local BLO will visit for physical verification of your documents.

booth.title: Find Polling Booth
booth.desc: Locate your designated polling station on the ECI website.

vote.title: Cast Your Vote
vote.desc: Head to your booth with your EPIC card and cast your vote.

tips.registration: FIRST-TIMER TIP: Keep your Aadhaar and a clear passport-size photo ready before starting Form 6.
tips.verification: FIRST-TIMER TIP: The BLO will call you before visiting. Keep your originals handy for quick verification.
tips.booth: FIRST-TIMER TIP: Booths are usually in schools or community halls nearby. Check the map a day before.
tips.vote: FIRST-TIMER TIP: Don't forget your ink mark! It's a badge of honor for every citizen.

documents.title: Document Checklist
documents.subtitle: Ensure you have these documents ready for verification.

alert.title: Verification Incomplete
alert.desc: Missing mandatory documents. This may delay approval.

sidebar.safety_desc: Documents are used only for verification and then securely deleted.

aadhar.title: Aadhaar Card
aadhar.desc: Required for identity and age proof.

voter-id.title: Voter ID (if any)
voter-id.desc: Existing EPIC card if you are already registered.

address-proof.title: Address Proof
address-proof.desc: Electricity bill, Gas connection, or Bank passbook.

pan-card.title: PAN Card
pan-card.desc: Optional identity proof for additional verification.

eligibility.title: Eligibility Check
eligibility.subtitle: Let's see if you can vote in the next election.
eligibility.registered_question: Are you already registered to vote?
eligibility.desc_eligible: Congratulations! You are eligible to vote in the upcoming elections.
eligibility.desc_not_eligible: Unfortunately, you do not meet the criteria to vote yet.
eligibility.reason_age: You must be at least 18 years old to vote.
eligibility.reason_citizen: Only Indian citizens are eligible to vote.
eligibility.next_step_documents: Keep your Aadhaar and address proof ready
eligibility.age_desc: You must be 18 years or older to be eligible to vote.
eligibility.info_guideline: Your information is only used to check your voting eligibility as per Election Commission guidelines.
eligibility.why_ask_desc: We follow the guidelines set by the Election Commission of India to ensure a fair and transparent democratic process.
eligibility.safe_desc: We don't store your personal data. It is only used for eligibility checking.

timeline.title: Election Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Key dates for the 2026 General Elections

chat.welcome: Hello! I am your Civic AI assistant. How can I help you today?
chat.mock_response: I'm a mock AI assistant. Soon I'll be powered by Gemini to provide real-time election information!

suggestions.register: How do I register to vote?
suggestions.need_help_desc: Ask about voting steps, booths, or required IDs.

constituency.title: Constituency Insights
constituency.subtitle: Know your local development progress
constituency.transparency_desc: We collect data from official government sources to ensure transparency. All insights are updated regularly for accuracy.
All development data is verified by the State Audit Bureau and updated every quarter for full citizen oversight.

results.title: Constituency Insights
results.subtitle: Deep dive into your local constituency's voter landscape.
results.heatmap_desc: Visualizing registered voter concentration across areas.

booth_finder.title: Find My Booth
booth_finder.subtitle: Enter your PIN code to locate your designated polling station.
booth_finder.no_results: No booths found for this PIN code.
booth_finder.milestone_desc: Great! You've identified your polling station. Completing this milestone earns you the {badge} badge and points.

myth_fact.title: Myth vs Fact
myth_fact.subtitle: Busting common election rumors with verified facts.
myth_fact.verify_desc: Always check information on the official Election Commission of India website or app before believing or sharing rumors.

item1.myth: I have a Voter ID card, so I can definitely vote.
item1.fact: Having an EPIC card is not enough. Your name MUST be present in the official Electoral Roll to vote.

item2.myth: I can vote from any polling station in my city.
item2.fact: No. You can only vote at the specific polling booth assigned to you in the voter list.

item3.myth: Registered voters can vote online from home.
item3.fact: Currently, the ECI does not provide an online voting facility for general citizens. You must visit your booth.

help_others.title: Help Someone Vote
help_others.subtitle: Share the simple 4-step process with friends and family to ensure everyone's voice is heard.
help_others.modal_subtitle: Empower your community by sharing essential voting information.
help_others.share_message:
🗳️ *Voting Guide 2026*

1. Register: Fill Form 6 at voters.eci.gov.in
2. Verify: Keep documents ready for BLO visit
3. Locate: Find your booth via EPIC number
4. Vote: Visit booth on election day!

Help your community vote: {link}
help_others.share_checklist_msg:
🗳️ *My Voting Checklist*

I've prepared my documents for the 2026 Elections. Prepare yours and get ready to vote: {link}
help_others.share_progress_msg: 📈 I am {progress}% ready for the 2026 Elections! Check your voting readiness here: {link}
help_others.share_guide_msg: 📘 Here is a simple step-by-step guide to voting in the 2026 Elections. Share it with anyone who needs help: {link}

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.notif_deadline_registration: Registration closes in 2 days. Complete your Form 6 today!
notifications.notif_incomplete_profile: Your profile is incomplete. Finish it to see your voting readiness.
notifications.notif_voting_day: Election Day is approaching on May 20th. Don't forget to vote!
notifications.notif_eligible_now: Congratulations! Based on your age, you are now eligible to vote.
notifications.notif_document_pending: You have {count} documents pending in your checklist.

updates.title: Election Updates
updates.subtitle: Latest official news and voter tips

ballot.title: Mock Ballot Practice
ballot.subtitle: Practice casting your preference. All data is local, private, and anonymous.
ballot.practice_success: Excellent! You've successfully practiced the voting process. This helps build the muscle memory needed for the real election day.
ballot.principles_note: Choice made based on democratic principles.
ballot.why_practice_desc: Familiarizing yourself with the ballot layout reduces anxiety and potential errors on election day.
ballot.voter_secrecy_desc: Your practice choices are never stored or shared. This is a local simulation for your benefit.

laboratory.title: Virtual EVM Simulator
laboratory.subtitle: Understand the internal working of India's voting technology.
laboratory.lab_desc: Test upcoming civic technologies and practice democratic processes in a secure environment.
laboratory.evm_desc: Experience the full lifecycle of a digital vote. Practice machine activation, ballot selection, and VVPAT verification to build technical confidence.
laboratory.fact_check_desc: Test our real-time deepfake detection and social media rumor monitoring tools. Help us calibrate the safety engines for 2026.
laboratory.volunteer_desc: Our Innovation Lab relies on real citizen feedback to harden democratic tools. Apply to join our beta program and get early access to voting security features.
laboratory.cast_vote: Experience the secure, digital-first voting simulation.
laboratory.audit_desc: This simulation demonstrates the verifiable nature of electronic voting. Your selection is printed on a slip, shown behind a glass for 7 seconds, and then falls into a sealed box.

info.cu_desc: The brain of the EVM that manages machines.
info.bu_desc: Where citizens press the button to vote.
info.vvpat_desc: Verified paper audit trail for every vote.

laboratory.encapsulated_desc: Independent units with no external connectivity (WiFi/Bluetooth).
laboratory.firmware_desc: Code is burnt into the chip at manufacture, cannot be altered.
laboratory.audit_desc: The VVPAT unit provides a paper audit trail of your vote for 7 seconds, ensuring complete transparency and verifiability.

info.cu_desc: The brain of the EVM that resides with the Presiding Officer.
info.bu_desc: Where the voter presses the button for their choice.
info.vvpat_desc: Voter Verifiable Paper Audit Trail for transparency.

voting_day.readiness_msg: Your readiness is {progress}%. You have everything you need to make your voice heard.
voting_day.stuck_help: Stuck? Look for the presiding officer in the room or use the help button in the corner.

step1.title: Verification
step1.desc: Show your ID to the polling officer

step2.title: Authentication
step2.desc: Get your finger inked and sign the register

step3.title: Ballot Selection
step3.desc: Select your preferred candidate on the EVM

step4.title: Final Check
step4.desc: Wait for the beep sound and verify VVPAT
